title: Eva 13 and Shinji who was really in control
display_title: Eva 13 and Shinji who was really in control
wikitext:
[]: Eva-13 and Shinji -- who was really in control?             Quote Post by kboyrulez12345 » Mon Sep 02, 2013 9:08 am [Split from "3.33 Things You Noticed" . - Monk] Say, about the scene when Kaworu's controls were locked... I know a lot of people have said that Shinji was the one who locked the controls. But did anyone notice that during 4th Impact and while the Choker was ready to blow up Kaworu's head, Shinji was trying to reach out to Kaworu to save him? Why would he try to save him if he knew he locked the controls. Better yet, if he did lock the controls, why didn't he just unlock it to reach Kaworu? Was that ever pointed out?

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Mon Sep 02, 2013 9:24 am You know? That popped in my head at some point. Actually I originally assumed, that it wasn't Shinji who blocked Kaworu, but Gendo's back up program blocked Kaworu's entry plug to make sure that he won't be able to forcefully interfere with Shinji's actions once he notice the trickery.

[]:             Quote Post by kboyrulez12345 » Mon Sep 02, 2013 10:44 am Stillborn wrote: You know? That popped in my head at some point. Actually I originally assumed, that it wasn't Shinji who blocked Kaworu, but Gendo's back up program blocked Kaworu's entry plug to make sure that he won't be able to forcefully interfere with Shinji's actions once he notice the trickery.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Mon Sep 02, 2013 10:54 am I don't think it was a force field. They were in two separate plugs. They most likely seen each other on screen placed at the sides of plugs.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Sep 02, 2013 10:55 am Guys, Shinji and Kaworu were in two different entry plugs. And take a good look at the part where Shinji reaches out for Kaworu. His hand collides with the monitors lining the entry plug, causing the screen to turn off and revealing the metallic interior for a moment. The only reason they look like they're in the same space is because of the monitors they use.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Mon Sep 02, 2013 11:20 am That's what I said a moment ago :P

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Sep 02, 2013 12:01 pm That's because I took three minutes trying to explain very clearly why that's a plug monitor and not a forcefield. The timestamp puts you at just a minute ahead of me here. [/offtopic] Frankly, even if the observation in question had been correct it would have gone into a thread of its own, not sit in this thread.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Mon Sep 02, 2013 12:32 pm Ok. So leaving our failed discussion about "force field"... Do you think it's more possible that Gendo planted blocking device in Kaworu plug, that supposed to activate under certain conditions, or was it really Shinji who blocked him? Also is this the right question in this topic?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Sep 02, 2013 12:44 pm Not the right question in the topic - but I'll answer it anyway. It's Shinji who blocks the controls, and Shinji does the same thing in 2.0 after the Bardiel incident. Any other minor observations? I have none on my end, unfortunately.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 02, 2013 3:49 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Not the right question in the topic - but I'll answer it anyway. It's Shinji who blocks the controls, and Shinji does the same thing in 2.0 after the Bardiel incident.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Mon Sep 02, 2013 3:56 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Is there another thread for this? Because I actually think it was Unit 13 that blocked both of them from the controls. It's eyes started glowing red before it grabbed the spears, and the controls stopped working even for Shinji after the Unit got the spears, making me think that the Unit had awaken prior to getting the spears and was just yanking them out of Lilith on its own.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 02, 2013 4:00 pm ^ Yeah. I mean, the "force field" is simply the fact they they're in two separate Entry-Plugs and can see each other through monitors. But the way the controls operate (or don't) in relation to the Eva's changing state seems too fishy in order to be a clear-cut "Shinji did it."

[]:             Quote Post by Conspicuous » Mon Sep 02, 2013 4:05 pm Well, it happens immediately after Kaworu is kicked out of the controls, so I was just under the impression that it's supposed to represent "danger", rather than the Evangelion taking control. What would be the point of it taking control now, anyhow? Shinji was going through the motions of pulling the spears anyway, and they would've been pulled regardless.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Mon Sep 02, 2013 4:09 pm Contingency plan. In case Kaworu or Asuka convinced Shinji not to pull them. It wouldn't be Gendo without backup plan to backup plan.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 02, 2013 7:36 pm Come to think of it, the controls going out on Shinji is really weird. Even when Unit 01 had waken up, Shinji was more or less in control, in that stuff happened when he pushed buttons. The controls of Unit 13 wonking out on him (whether they be before or after grabbing the spears) seems really odd. I wonder if someone is controlling Unit 13 remotely, or, if the controls wigged out after Shinji grabbed the spears, maybe that's just the kind of effect those spears have on an Eva. I might be going back on my own theory I posted earlier... After all, locking Kaowru out would fall in line with Shinji's selfishness.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Sep 02, 2013 8:41 pm The eyes turn red when Shinji takes over control, as a sign that control has shifted to him instead of both of them. The real loss of control happens after he pulls out the Spears - that's when the Eva chomps on the Angel all on its own and its eyes bulge and turn a deeper red (the same as Eva-01 in the Zeruel battle). After that, Shinji is just a passenger in his awakened Eva. I don't think it's so much a forcefield as the Eva itself cutting out Shinji's controls.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Sep 03, 2013 5:48 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Come to think of it, the controls going out on Shinji is really weird. Even when Unit 01 had waken up, Shinji was more or less in control, in that stuff happened when he pushed buttons.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Thu Oct 10, 2013 10:38 am [Split the discussion of seat directions into a new thread: "Eva-13 Entry Plug Seat Directions [Split]" - OMF] Kendrix wrote: Did Shinji's active presence (as opposed to later when he was essentially just sobbing and staring in horror) somehow override that?

[]:             Quote Post by mireyu » Fri Oct 11, 2013 12:49 pm I was wondering... If Shinji took control of Eva 13... it was always him piercing the unit with the spears? My impression is that Kaworu pierced the Eva to try ending the impact. Anyone?

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Oct 11, 2013 1:04 pm Yes, Kaworu is the one who make EVA-13 impale itself : 01:24:54 {Kaworu} I'm sorry. This wasn't the happiness you desired. 01:24:59 {Kaworu} I'll close the Door of Guf.
